subject: A large panther sculpted entirely from dense green hedge foliage, prowling forward across a manicured garden path
description: A life-sized topiary in the form of a stalking panther, its body composed entirely of densely clipped green hedge leaves, prowls down a gravel garden path. The sculpted feline retains the musculature and predatory crouch of a real big cat, with leafy ears pricked forward and a long curling tail. Behind it, tall manicured hedges and ornamental shrubs frame a formal estate garden under flat ambient daylight. The palette is dominated by saturated greens with warm tan accents from the path. No birds or other wildlife are visible, consistent with the flavor text about the gardens being 'oddly bereft of birdsong.'
foreground: topiary panther sculpted from hedge foliage on a gravel garden path
background: manicured estate hedges and ornamental shrubbery framing a formal garden
emotion: predatory stalking poise; uncanny stillness despite the animal posture
